titleStmt.title: SII 9.391: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 391. (A.R. No. 216 of 1918.) IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is not dated. The five hundred svāmis of Ayyāvoḷe, who are described as setting the servants of Yama in motion, as roaring with the thunderbolt in hand, as giving their enemies to Yama and as generous to the submissive, are said to have gathered together with the Nānādēsi merchants and the Mummuridaṇḍas in Kuṟuvatti and made a gift of one pāga of the hejjuṅka to Lōkābharaṇa-Munīndra for the service of god Āhavamallesvara. As this Lōkābharaṇa is mentioned in No. 389, the present record may also belong to the time of Vikramāditya II.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastavastuvistīrṇnabhuvanavikhyātapaṁcaśatavīraśāsanalabdhānēkaguṇagaṇāṇaṁ kṛtasa-tyaśau
cācāracārucāritra nayavinayavijñānavīrāvatāra baṇaṁjudharmmapratipāḷana .
viśuddhaguḍḍadhvajavirājamānānūnalakṣmīsamāliṁgitaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷatribhuvanavīraparākramōṁ
nataruṁ śrīvāsudēvakhaṁḍaḷīmūḷabhadravaṁśōdbhavaruṁ bhalluṁkedaṇḍahastarumappa śrīmadayyā
voḷeyainūrvvarsvāmigaḷumukhyavanēkanāḍa samastanānādēśigaḷuṁ seṭṭiyaruṁ seṭṭi gutta
ru muṁmuridaṁḍasāgaraṁgaḷuṁ kuṟuvattiyalli mahānāḍāgirddu . javadūtara jaḍḍaṁ kūṟāḍuvarā baṟa
siḍilaṁ piḍidu meṟevarpratiyappavanaṁ javaṁge kuḍuvarttavatavagōrorvvaroldaḍīvarkkāvar . neredopputirddai
nūrvvarāhumallēśvaraṁge pūjege lōkābharaṇamunigoldu hejjuṁkarāvuḷada pāgamittarācaṁdrārkka .
dēvarettu matte kōṇaṁ pēṟidaḍaṁ suṁkakāṇikeyuṁ koṁḍaṁ nāḍiṁge drōhiyendu biṭṭaridaṁ pāḷipaṁge svargga .
Digital edition of SII 9.391 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
